reviews.review_title: It says I have no internet
reviews.review_description: Idk what is going on. When I joined today it said I had no internet connection should I check tomorrow the games. And it said it's okay then I'll check my Wi-Fi in my house and it says that's okay. So I don't know what's going on and I need a link to the discord. Or tell me the owner's channel. I care about this game and I'm not just saying this to become mod. I don't even know how to become mod but I just love this game. Please do not let anything bad happen to this game. And if you do report this game just to let you know I'm coming for your family

Ok guys if you see no Internet connection  restart your game also something is going on with the script if you see that you are banned or no Internet connection join the discord please and talk to me coke or mat about it  I am very active in game and in server or private DM me if things are still poopy

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review. 

The reason you cant connect to a lobby is because we use the free servers, which means there can only be 20 people online at once. We are also fixing the "Quit On Kill" thing thats going around.

Scary Monke Horror on VR is an immersive experience that takes players into a chilling world filled with suspense and unexpected frights. The game cleverly utilizes virtual reality technology to enhance the horror elements, making every jump scare and eerie sound feel incredibly real. 

One of the standout features of Scary Monke Horror is its atmospheric design. The environments are intricately crafted, with dim lighting and haunting soundscapes that draw players into the game's unsettling atmosphere. As you navigate through the dark corridors and abandoned locations, the sense of dread builds, keeping you on edge. The attention to detail in the graphics adds to the immersion, making you feel as though you are truly part of the game.

Gameplay mechanics are intuitive, allowing players to focus on the narrative and the horror elements without being bogged down by complicated controls. The story unfolds gradually, revealing the backstory of the infamous "monke" and the mysteries surrounding it. Players must solve puzzles and evade terrifying encounters, which keeps the gameplay engaging and dynamic. Overall, Scary Monke Horror is a thrilling VR experience that successfully combines horror with interactive gameplay, making it a must-try for fans of the genre.
